title: Cleerly - AI Coronary Analysis
problem: Coronary artery disease assessment relies on indirect measures like stress tests rather than direct plaque characterization.
solution: AI-powered coronary artery disease analysis from CCTA, providing detailed plaque characterization and stenosis quantification.
technology: Deep learning, computer vision, coronary CT angiography analysis
target_customer: Cardiologists, preventive cardiology programs, health systems
varden_fit: Moderate - Diagnostic tool with care pathway implications. Non-invasive alternative to angiography.
notes: Novel approach to CAD diagnosis. Strong AI capabilities in cardiac imaging.
